List your shop
Built for local shops, block by block

Every local shop deserves to be found.

LocalLine automatically connects customers with whichever local vendor is nearest for the product they want — no searching, no comparing shops. Just fresh, close-by products, and more customers finding shops that were always right there.

Grow your shop's sales → See how matching works
Scanning nearby vendors...
✓ Nearest match found
The problem

The best shop on your street is often the one you never find.

Local vendors compete against platforms with warehouses, ad budgets, and rankings that favor whoever pays the most — not whoever is actually closest to you. Great local shops stay invisible to the very customers living next door to them.

1
tap to reach nearby shops — no search needed
0
warehouses — every order comes from a real local shop
The fix

LocalLine automatically matches every product to the vendor nearest you.

No browsing shop pages. No comparing ratings. You look for a product, and we find whichever nearby vendor already has it — fresh, local, and close by.

How matching works

You never pick a shop. We do that part for you.

This is intentional — deciding between five nearby grocers shouldn't be your job. Just look for what you need.

  • 🔎

    Search or browse by category

    Groceries, bakery, pharmacy, restaurants — organized simply, with no shop names cluttering the view.

  • 📍

    We scan every nearby vendor

    Every local shop carrying that product, within your neighborhood, gets checked automatically.

  • ✓

    The closest one gets the order

    Fresher, faster to prepare, and it keeps your money circulating in your own neighborhood.

No shop-picking, on purpose. LocalLine shows you products, not a directory of stores to compare — the matching happens behind the scenes.
The people behind every order

Three neighbors, one neighborhood loop.

A customer orders, a vendor prepares it, a rider carries it across the block — all three, all local.

🏪
Vendors
List what's already on their shelves — no new inventory, just new customers.
🛵
Riders
Short, local routes — pick up and drop off within the same neighborhood.
🙂
Customers
Fresh, close-by products — matched automatically, no shop-hunting.
Our whole reason for building this

We built LocalLine to grow your shop's sales — not to compete with you.

Every order on LocalLine goes to a real local shop. There's no warehouse undercutting you, no ranking system you have to pay into. Just customers near you, automatically matched to what you already sell.

  • List your existing catalog — no new stock needed
  • Automatic matching means no ad spend to be "found"
  • Transparent commission, daily payouts
  • Your shop stays visible to every nearby customer, always
Ready to reach more of your neighborhood?
Takes minutes to list your shop and start appearing to nearby customers.
List Your Shop →
For everyone else in the loop

Simple for customers. Fair for riders.

🙂

For customers

Look for what you need — we handle the rest. Fresh products from the nearest local vendor, tracked from pickup to your door, with no shop directory to sort through.

🛵

For riders

Short, local routes within your own neighborhood. Flexible shifts, transparent earnings, and a guaranteed minimum on days you meet your conditions.

Get started

Your neighborhood's shops are one download away.

LocalLine is heading to Google Play and the App Store soon. Vendors and riders can get started even sooner.
